title: Security baselines
note: Microsoft's current baseline principles and delivery overview for Windows security baselines.

title: Microsoft Security Compliance Toolkit - How to use
note: Microsoft's official toolkit guide for downloading and applying Windows baselines.

title: Get support for security baselines
note: Includes Microsoft baseline release matrix. Still lists Windows 11 24H2 and Windows 10 22H2 in the Learn matrix.

title: Windows 11 - release information
note: Current Windows release tracking page. As verified on 2026-04-23 it lists Windows 11 26H1 as available from 2026-02-10 and Windows 11 25H2 from 2025-09-30.

title: Windows 11, version 25H2 security baseline
note: Latest named Windows client security baseline package I verified. Official Microsoft Security Baselines blog post.

title: Windows MDM security baseline settings reference for Microsoft Intune
note: Current Microsoft Learn reference that exposes the default settings for the Intune Windows 11 version 25H2 security baseline, including only MDM-applicable settings.

title: Windows 11 v24H2 Security Baseline.zip
note: Microsoft baseline package archive containing the security baseline workbook, PolicyRules, Group Policy reports, and release notes for Windows 11 v24H2.

title: Android Enterprise feature list
note: Current Android Enterprise capability contract. Closest Google equivalent to a managed-device baseline feature matrix.

title: Understanding Security Posture
note: Explains device posture, security risks, and hardware-backed key attestation in Android Management API.

title: Google System updates on devices enrolled using Android Enterprise
note: Google's official guidance for system update policy and compliance-based update enforcement on managed Android devices.

title: Google Play Protect
note: Google's managed-device guidance for malware scanning and Play Protect enforcement.

title: What's new in Android Enterprise: Feature Drop
note: Current public Android Enterprise update article highlighting advanced protection and integrated defense changes.

title: Android security best practices
note: Google's platform-level Android security best-practices guide. More OEM/platform focused than enterprise management focused.

title: Apple Platform Deployment
note: Current Apple deployment and device-management guide edition. Broad Apple-platform scope, used here as the primary macOS deployment reference.

title: What's new in Apple platform deployment
note: Current Apple deployment change log page. References current macOS 26.4.1 and iOS 26.4.1 management updates.

title: Install and enforce software updates
note: Apple deployment guidance for software update enforcement behavior and rollout posture.

title: Use device management to deploy software updates
note: Apple deployment guidance for using device management to enforce and defer software updates.

title: Activation Lock
note: Apple deployment guidance for Activation Lock and organizational recovery handling.

title: Enforce password policies
note: Apple deployment guidance for passcode and password policy enforcement through device management.

title: Managed Device Attestation
note: Apple deployment guidance for managed device attestation and hardware-backed management trust.

title: Manage FileVault with device management
note: Apple deployment guidance for configuring FileVault through device management payloads.

title: Apple Platform Security
note: Current Apple platform security guide edition. Broad Apple-platform scope, used here as the primary macOS security reference.

title: Startup security in macOS
note: Apple's startup security and recovery-protected policy guidance for macOS.

title: Managing FileVault in macOS
note: Apple's current FileVault management guidance referencing SecureToken and Bootstrap Token.

title: Gatekeeper and runtime protection in macOS
note: Apple's current Gatekeeper, notarization, and runtime protection guidance for macOS.
